Hooked 1.1.1.description: A very small and fast-paced map suitable for intense close-quarters 1v1 skirmishes.

BarR 1.1.description: A compact rocky wasteland featuring rugged cliffs and sandy paths that create tactical choke points.

Avalanche 3.4.description: A cold winter map with snowy plains and icy cliffs, offering a distinct visual style and terrain barriers.

Coast To Coast BAR v1.0.description: A wide battlefield likely featuring coastal lanes and cliffs, balancing land combat with potential naval support.

Crater Islands Remake v1.0.1.description: A map featuring a chain of grassy islands and varied elevations, emphasizing naval control and amphibious assaults.

Altored Divide Bar Remake 1.6.2.description: A large-scale macro map divided by mountainous terrain, offering diverse biomes from grassy plains to rocky cliffs.
